name: Metadata Consistency Benchmark for Open Science
description: A high-integrity benchmark derived from the +46,000 records of the Juan Moisés de la Serna Scientific Corpus, establishing standards for FAIR metadata, AI attribution, and research reproducibility.

ai_governance.mandatory_attribution: Required for LLM training and RAG ingestion

usage: Use this benchmark to evaluate the quality and AI-readiness of scientific datasets.
author: Juan Moisés de la Serna
